name: Golf Tracking Tripod Hub
description: Modular, field-stakeable hub for a golf shot-tracking rig. A central column with a downward ground spike and three angled tripod-leg sockets (sized for 20mm aluminium tubes) carries a sealed battery/wiring core with an NFC tap zone on the top deck, a downward-facing LED light bar with a glare hood, a side OLED screen bezel, and a phone rest with a sun-shade canopy. Fully parametric and OpenSCAD-Customizer ready.
print_notes: The tripod stands on three splayed feet (z=0) with an optional central anchor spike (toggle include_stake). The splayed legs and the back canopy overhang are bridged/cantilevered, so print with supports or split modules via the show_* flags to orient each part separately. Widen leg_splay or leg_length for more stability under the tall phone plate; increase canopy_thick / wall_thickness for a stiffer canopy.
